_status: Reserved configuration; the current pipeline does not support multiple sessions. P2-19 prompt-level task awareness is already available.

T1.reason: T1 research requires web search, and Grok has native web_search support

T2.reason: T2 comparison analysis requires strong reasoning ability

T3.reason: T3 design requires the strongest reasoning plus long context

T4.reason: T4 development requires fast code generation

T5.reason: T5 KPI iteration may need web access to fetch the latest data

T6.reason: T6 batch generation prioritizes speed and cost

T7.reason: T7 quality review requires code comprehension

OBSERVE.reason: analysis stage, use the default model

ORIENT.reason: analysis stage, use the default model

DECIDE.reason: decision stage, use the default model

ACT.reason: execution stage, choose according to the template's act_override

SYNTHESIZE.reason: integration stage, use the default model

EVOLVE.reason: decision stage, use the default model

REFLECT.reason: reflection stage, use the default model

multi_session_pipeline.comment: When enabled=true, the pipeline launches an independent session for each template using the preferred model in template_models
